title: APEX Root Narrative And Workspace Governance Extraction
objective: Execute the first bounded physical movement tranche from the completed APEX-root decomposition plan by extracting only the approved root narrative, architecture-lineage, and workspace-governance slices into their platform-root target homes while preserving provenance, keeping transitional material explicitly non-authoritative, and avoiding Supabase, archive-wide, runtime, or PM-authority movement.
active_role: APEX Narrative And Governance Extraction Operator
dependency_note: Packet 001 produced the tranche-ordered decomposition plan and movement manifest. Packet 001a is the first bounded physical movement packet and is limited to tranche 1 only: root narrative, architecture-lineage, and workspace-governance extraction.
constrained_outputs: A bounded tranche-1 physical movement pass for approved root narrative, architecture-lineage, and workspace-governance slices only
Imported target-home artifacts under docs/architecture/apex-lineage and ops/agents/legacy-governance, plus archive routing only where the tranche manifest explicitly requires it
An execution handoff documenting exact moved slices, preserved exclusions, wording normalization if any, and residual tranche-1 blockers
validation_steps: Confirm packet 001a moves only the tranche-1 approved slices and does not touch Supabase or broader residue tranches
Confirm transitional narrative and governance material remains explicitly non-authoritative unless a target-home note says otherwise
Confirm excluded slices were not moved and provenance is still understandable from the resulting target homes
Confirm no PM schema authority, runtime code, or deployable app surfaces were changed
sql_permission_note: Packet 001a authorizes only bounded tranche-1 physical movement for approved narrative and governance slices. It does not authorize Supabase tranche movement, runtime code changes, PM authority changes, or wholesale root cleanup.
